reviews.review_description: Except for Blacktop Hoops, all basketball shooting games in the AppLab — including this one — suffer from a poorly executed shooting mechanism that is far from realistic. This game is more frustrating than it is fun. Definitely not worth $15.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying our game!

In the hand menu, there are settings where you can customize the physics for the release and tailor it to your play style. 

Where do you think the throw mechanic is lacking? We would love your feedback so we can improve player experience! You can reach us directly at daveandmikegames@gmail.com.

reviews.review_description: The shooting was weird at first, but after a few rounds I started to get the hang of it (release timing?). I like the hand eye coordination challenge this game presents and that the levels are hard without being impossible. Would be cool to see public multiplayer  matches in the future instead of just direct connect.
